mnemonics.title: Set Ordering
mnemonics.content: H.L.T. - HashSet (Has no order), LinkedHashSet (Linked insertion order), TreeSet (Tree sorted order)

mnemonics.title: Map Characteristics
mnemonics.content: H.L.T. - HashMap (Hash table, no order), LinkedHashMap (Linked order), TreeMap (Tree sorted order)

mnemonics.title: Performance Remember
mnemonics.content: ArrayLists are fast for GET, LinkedLists are fast for ADD/SET
